posts.text: as Democrats we must resist the temptation of digital distractions on X (or whatever it’s calling itself today) 📱. Our time is best spent uniting against the tide of fascism 🦸‍♂️✊, not squabbling over algorithms. Let’s stay grounded, organized, and relentlessly committed to a better future #StayFocused

posts.text: Trump & Musk’s X are a threat to democracy & trans safety. 🚨 Musk’s free speech absolutism fuels hate, making transphobia mainstream. 🧨 We can't let platforms amplify lies & harm. It's time to fight for a future where everyone is safe & heard. 🌈✊  #DefendDemocracy  #TransLivesMatter #MuskIsDangerous
